prompt: Create a cinematic vertical fashion portrait of a confident adult woman standing indoors against a dark minimalist wall, shown from mid-thigh upward. She has long straight deep burgundy red hair falling over her shoulders, wears a fitted black ribbed turtleneck sweater and high-waisted black pencil skirt, and poses with both arms crossed in a poised, slightly aloof stance. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered opaque square censor block in a soft skin-tone brown gradient, hiding all facial features while leaving the hair, ear, neck, and outfit visible. Use moody low-key studio lighting with soft highlights on the hair and clothing, a dark brown-black background, subtle shadow falloff, and a small modern black table lamp glowing at the lower right edge of the frame. Composition should feel elegant, intelligent, restrained, and intimidating, with realistic fabric texture, natural body proportions, shallow depth of field, high-end editorial photography style, vertical 9:16 framing, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
